title: Amethyst Imbuement
description: A magic mod focused on crystal magic, spell casting, and utilizing your experience
body:
![Amethyst Imbuement Main Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ikgvECm.png) Welcome to Amethyst Imbuement, a mod all about the innate magic within crystals, gems, and you! Use your experience as a resource to transmute various crystals and materials, infuse equipment with magical abilities, craft powerful new items, and more. Here is just some of what Amethyst Imbuement has to offer! [![Bisect Hosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp "Bisect Hosting Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs) _Amethyst Imbuement is now powered by Amethyst Core!_ _It's recommended you also install EMI or REI and it's associated dependencies, but it's not required._ _This mod is for FABRIC. A Forge port is not planned at this time._

![Imbuing Banner](https://i.imgur.com/0UJiDOy.png) Imbuing in the Imbuing Table is the heart of Amethyst Imbuement. Imbuing combines advanced crafting and enchanting, fueled by your experience * Craft with 4 extra materials slots for more intense recipes. * Fuel imbuing recipes with experience levels like enchanting. * Imbuing is based on crystal magic; find gems scattered around the world or imbue them to craft more advanced recipes! * Enchant equipment too! Enchant items up to level 60 and unlock enchantments not possible with vanilla enchanting! [IMBUING VIDEO LINK](https://youtu.be/YEb7uupIBhw) ![Scepters Banner](https://i.imgur.com/Aixh7pe.gif) Want to wield the primal forces of nature to devastate foes and bolster allies? Look no further! Use scepters to cast a wide array of offensive, defensive, and utility spells. * Upgrade your scepter with powerful magical focuses hidden in treasure chests to unlock more powerful abilities. * Find or trade for magical tomes to imbue your scepter with over 40 unique spells! * Apply modifiers to your scepter to further improve its spellcasting capabilities. * Quickly swap between spells as needed. [SCEPTERS VIDEO LINK](https://youtu.be/cz9apmglWOM) ![Trinkets Banner](https://i.imgur.com/reN5nWB.png) Not feeling powerful enough yet? Adorn yourself with customizable jewelry and totems and reap the benefits of passive and active status effects and abilities! * Pieces of jewelry can be crafted, traded for, and even found when exploring. * Jewelry offers mild benefits as-is, but don’t stop there. Imbue your jewelry to grant yourself abilities like luck, strength, even the ability to see ore through solid rock! * Craft your very own custom and reusable Totem! Imbue it with abilities beyond (but including) undying. * New in the _Spellcaster's Update_, the __Spellcasters Focus__, __Witches Orb__, and __Imbued Ward__ join the trinket party; powerful offhands that bolster spells, level up as you do, protect you from harm, and more! [TRINKETS VIDEO LINK](https://youtu.be/JFXOyrbW-u8) ![More Banner](https://i.imgur.com/0dB4Def.png) Amethyst Imbuement has much more to offer beyond the above! Dive in and explore all there is to do… * Store and retrieve experience from the Altar of Experience. No need to worry about losing all the levels you worked so hard for! * Strip enchantments of your choice from items with the Disenchanting Table! Want that Mending off of the leather boots you found? No problem! * Craft a deadly sniper bow or upgrade your trident to a glistering version. * Upgrade your gear with augments not available via vanilla enchanting. Double Jump? Check. Knockback resistance? Check. Step Assist? Check! And that’s just scratching the surface. * 15 brand new enchantments available in either the vanilla enchanting table or in the imbuing table. * Assemble a powerful Crystalline Golem to protect you and your villagers. * Speaking of villagers, find Crystal Witches in villages and trade with them for Amethyst Imbuement gear and supplies! * Simply Swords weapons made from Ametrine, Garnet, Glowing, and Steel are now added by [Knaves Needs!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/knaves-needs) * And more! _Modpack creators, please feel free to include this mod in a modpack as long as I am credited!_ _Enjoy and please let me know if you have feedback or issues!_
